title: Insights from artist
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Renowned artist Helena Gerber...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Renowned artist Helena Gerber hosted a gathering of artists and art lovers at her home and studio space on Friday 19 April.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Renowned artist Helena Gerber hosted a gathering of artists and art lovers at her home and studio space on Friday 19 April."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As a prominent figure in the local art community, Helena shared invaluable insights into the challenges artists face, the importance of self-promotion and the journey towards artistic growth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visit was arranged by the Knysna Arts Society - the organisation is responsible for arranging monthly art visits and events to drive engagement in the arts and culture scene in Knysna.","html":"The visit was arranged by the Knysna Arts Society - the organisation is responsible for arranging monthly art visits and events to drive engagement in the arts and culture scene in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through her own experiences and creative wisdom, Helena aimed to inspire and support fellow artists in their pursuit of success.","html":"Through her own experiences and creative wisdom, Helena aimed to inspire and support fellow artists in their pursuit of success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The artist and owner of the beloved Knysna institution, Art Café on Queen, emphasised the significance of actively participating in the art community. Helena's role as a mentor highlighted the transformative power of collective creativity and encouraged artists to contribute to the vibrant art scene in Knysna.","html":"The artist and owner of the beloved Knysna institution, Art Café on Queen, emphasised the significance of actively participating in the art community. Helena's role as a mentor highlighted the transformative power of collective creativity and encouraged artists to contribute to the vibrant art scene in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the key lessons imparted by Helena was to avoid imitating the style of others. Instead, artists were encouraged to explore their own artistic preferences and develop a distinctive style that reflects their individuality.","html":"One of the key lessons imparted by Helena was to avoid imitating the style of others. Instead, artists were encouraged to explore their own artistic preferences and develop a distinctive style that reflects their individuality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Furthermore, Helena advised artists to embrace constructive criticism, recognising it as an opportunity for growth rather than a personal setback. By channeling criticism into their creative process, artists can use it as a catalyst for innovation and self-improvement. It was a reminder that criticism is transient and true artistic fulfilment is enduring."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Helena stressed the importance of consistently creating, even when inspiration feels elusive. By engaging in the act of creation, artists tap into their creative energy, allowing inspiration to emerge organically.","html":"Helena stressed the importance of consistently creating, even when inspiration feels elusive. By engaging in the act of creation, artists tap into their creative energy, allowing inspiration to emerge organically."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This commitment to regular artistic practice enables artists to overcome creative blocks and unlock their full potential.","html":"This commitment to regular artistic practice enables artists to overcome creative blocks and unlock their full potential."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She also advised artists to document their artistic journey by compiling a portfolio that showcases their progression and the development of their unique style.","html":"She also advised artists to document their artistic journey by compiling a portfolio that showcases their progression and the development of their unique style."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Arts Society members converge in the stunning and art-filled residence of Helena Gerber.","html":"Knysna Arts Society members converge in the stunning and art-filled residence of Helena Gerber."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For artists aspiring to generate income from their craft, Helena emphasised the need for professionalism. Treating art as a serious business involves being organised, communicating promptly and clearly with clients, and completing tasks in a timely manner.","html":"For artists aspiring to generate income from their craft, Helena emphasised the need for professionalism. Treating art as a serious business involves being organised, communicating promptly and clearly with clients, and completing tasks in a timely manner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By upholding professional standards, artists can cultivate a reputation of reliability and establish long-lasting relationships with patrons and collectors.","html":"By upholding professional standards, artists can cultivate a reputation of reliability and establish long-lasting relationships with patrons and collectors."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Setting appropriate prices for artwork can be a challenging task and Helena advocated for a methodical approach, encouraging artists to determine the value of their work based on factors such as materials, time invested, and artistic merit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Consistency in pricing is crucial, avoiding the pitfalls of underpricing or overpricing. Artists should refrain from lowering prices solely to make a sale, as it undervalues their talent and undermines the sustainability of their artistic practice.","html":"Consistency in pricing is crucial, avoiding the pitfalls of underpricing or overpricing. Artists should refrain from lowering prices solely to make a sale, as it undervalues their talent and undermines the sustainability of their artistic practice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gerber's gathering of Knysna artists served as a platform for inspiration, guidance and support. Her wisdom shed light on the insecurities artists face and provided practical advice for navigating the art world.","html":"Gerber's gathering of Knysna artists served as a platform for inspiration, guidance and support. Her wisdom shed light on the insecurities artists face and provided practical advice for navigating the art world."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Artist Helena Gerber in her element, giving a live demonstration of how she paints with acrylic on canvas.","html":"Artist Helena Gerber in her element, giving a live demonstration of how she paints with acrylic on canvas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The art visit was filled with valuable advice for artists and collectors and left guests with immense inspiration as Helena herself gave a demonstration of creating an art piece with acrylic paints on canvas. Thereafter, guests were treated to delightful scones and tea from Art Café on Queen.","html":"The art visit was filled with valuable advice for artists and collectors and left guests with immense inspiration as Helena herself gave a demonstration of creating an art piece with acrylic paints on canvas. Thereafter, guests were treated to delightful scones and tea from Art Café on Queen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Members of the Knysna Arts Society gathered in Helena Gerber's home. Photo: Amanda","html":"Members of the Knysna Arts Society gathered in Helena Gerber's home. Photo: Amanda"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
